heading: Separation pay
label: 3042 Separation pay
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to repeal by .section 853h of this titlePub. L. 107–372

children.heading: Authorization of payment
children.label: a Authorization of payment
children.text: An officer who is separated under and who has completed more than three years of continuous active service immediately before that separation is entitled to separation pay computed under subsection (b) unless the Secretary determines that the conditions under which the officer is separated do not warrant payment of that pay.section 3041(a)(2) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the years of active service creditable to the officer; and

children.label: B
children.text: 12 times the monthly basic pay to which the officer was entitled at the time of separation.

children.heading: Three to six years
children.label: 2 Three to six years
children.text: In the case of an officer who has completed three or more but fewer than six years of continuous active service immediately before that separation, the amount of separation pay to be paid to the officer under this section is one-half of the amount computed under paragraph (1).

children.heading: Other conditions, requirements, and administrative provisions
children.label: c Other conditions, requirements, and administrative provisions
children.text: The provisions of subsections (f), (g), and (h) of shall apply to separation pay under this section in the same manner as such provisions apply to separation pay under that section.section 1174 of title 10
expresses a desire not to be selected for promotion; or
requests removal from the list of selectees.
